results.name: standard_verify
results.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

results.name: javascript_parse
results.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('app.html','utf8'); const scripts=[...html.matchAll(/<script[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)<\\/script>/g)].map(m=>m[1]); for (const s of scripts) new Function(s); console.log('JS_PARSE_PASSED')"

notes: No Spreadsheet schema changes were introduced.
No new individual executeGAS(payload...) write path was introduced.
